nodes.context: Neo-Nazi paramilitary group active in the US in 1983-1984, engaged in robberies and murder.
Anti-communist militia formed by Robert Jay Mathews before The Order, mostly Mormon survivalists.
White supremacist organization led by William Pierce, received funds from The Order.
White supremacist group led by Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr., received funds from The Order.
White supremacist organization affiliated with The Order; members David and Deborah Dorr were former members.
Successor group to The Order, active in Idaho in 1986, engaged in bombings.

edges.context: The Order was founded by Robert Jay Mathews, who previously formed the Sons of Liberty.
The Order distributed robbery proceeds to William Pierce, leader of the National Alliance.
The Order distributed robbery proceeds to Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr., leader of the White Patriot Party.
The Order had affiliations with Aryan Nations; members David and Deborah Dorr were former Aryan Nations members.
The Order II was an attempt to perpetuate the activities of the original Order, growing out of it.
Leaders David and Deborah Dorr were previously members of Aryan Nations.
